title: Mexican Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican-inspired dish made with chicken, pilaf, and tender Mexican spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the Mexican pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken.
Sprinkle the Mexican seasoning over the top of the pilaf and chicken, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pilaf is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with lime wedges if desired.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
